termsData.title: Terms of service
termsData.intro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the services offered by ReachPersona, including the TraQR platform, website, and related tools. By accessing or using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By using our website or TraQR platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, you should not use our services.

sections.heading: Use of Services
bullets: You agree to use the services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and credentials.
You must not misuse, copy, or redistribute any part of the website or software for unauthorized purposes.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content, trademarks, logos, and software provided on the ReachPersona and TraQR platforms are the property of ReachPersona or its licensors. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any content without written permission.

sections.heading: Payment and Subscriptions
sections.bodyStart: Certain services on TraQR are offered on a subscription basis. By subscribing, you agree to pay the applicable fees according to the pricing plan you select. Pricing details are available on the

sections.heading: Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these Terms or misuse of our services.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: ReachPersona and its affiliates are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the services, including but not limited to data loss or business interruption.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may modify these Terms from time to time. Updated versions will be posted on this page with a revised date. Continued use of the website or services after changes indicates your acceptance of the new Terms.

sections.heading: Contact Information
